name: Raven Microcyb 'Wiseman' Cyberspace Commando Full Conversion

system.notes:
Full Body Conversion (Chromebook 3). Whole-body cyborg chassis: takes Structural Damage per zone, not the human wound track - Head or Torso destroyed = the borg dies. SP 25 all zones; SDP disabled/destroyed = Head/limbs 20/30, Torso 30/40.

Option spaces: Head optic 0&0, audio 2; Torso 0; R.Arm 0/L.Arm 0; R.Leg 1/L.Leg 1.

Prebuilt options: netrunner rig: video-imager/net-vision/times-sq+ optics; micro-recorder/phone/scrambler/tight-beam audio; INT-3 computer; techscanner+CTD; chip ports; chronometer; cybermodem link; cellular cybermodem; extra 20MU databank/limb; auto-punchout; rip switch.

loadout.name: Video Imager
loadout.description: Video Imager cyberoptic option - projects video feeds directly to the optic. Socket optic from the Wiseman's netrunner rig (the book lists no separate HC for the optics package).

loadout.name: Net-Vision
loadout.description: Net-Vision cyberoptic option - displays the Net interface through the optic. Socket optic from the Wiseman's netrunner rig.

loadout.name: Times Sq+
loadout.description: Times Square Plus cyberoptic option - scrolling text/data display across the field of vision. Socket optic from the Wiseman's netrunner rig.

loadout.name: MicroVideo
loadout.description: MicroVideo cyberoptic option - miniature video camera built into the optic. Socket optic from the Wiseman's netrunner rig.

loadout.name: Micro Recorder
loadout.description: Micro Recorder cyberaudio option - records heard audio. Socket audio option from the Wiseman's netrunner rig (the book lists no separate HC for the audio package).

loadout.name: Phone Splice
loadout.description: Phone Splice cyberaudio option - taps into phone lines for calls through the cyberaudio. Socket audio option from the Wiseman's netrunner rig.

loadout.name: Scrambler
loadout.description: Scrambler cyberaudio option - encrypts outgoing radio/phone communications. Socket audio option from the Wiseman's netrunner rig.

loadout.name: Tight-Beam Radio
loadout.description: Tight-Beam Radio cyberaudio option - secure line-of-sight radio link. Socket audio option from the Wiseman's netrunner rig.

loadout.name: INT-3 Computer
loadout.description: Onboard computer providing an internal INT of 3 for processing.

loadout.name: DataShielding
loadout.description: Hardening that shields onboard data and neural systems from intrusion or damage.

loadout.name: Wet-Drive Access
loadout.description: Neural interface allowing direct wet-drive (brain-to-net) access.

loadout.name: Techscanner + CTD CompuMods
loadout.description: Techscanner and CTD compumods for internal technical scanning and analysis.

loadout.name: Chip Ports
loadout.description: Neural chip ports for loading skill and program chips.

loadout.name: Cybermodem Link
loadout.description: Built-in link to a cybermodem for net access.

loadout.name: Cellular Cybermodem
loadout.description: Integrated cellular cybermodem for wireless net connection.

loadout.name: Extra Databanks (20MU/limb)
loadout.description: Additional onboard data storage (20MU per limb).

loadout.name: Auto-Punchout
loadout.description: System that automatically jacks the 'borg out of the net in an emergency.

loadout.name: Rip Switch
loadout.description: Emergency cutoff switch to instantly sever the neural/net connection.
